In China, Master Yi all-in strategy is getting popular in the Master/Challenger rank.
The strategy is all about grinding Yi. They put Taric on mid with smite. In the mid lane, that Taric does not take minions. Instead, he freezes his minions, so that Yi can take it with alpha. So basically, Yi gets not only his jungle but also his mid-lane CS. With boosted his gold deposit, he strikes enemy team with alpha and Taric's ult. Since Yi's level and items are so boosted, opponents can't deal with Yi's power spike.
Even Apdo is banning Yi on his rank game. He said that he couldn't find a counter-strategy for him.
